name: stripe-billing-master
description: Expert Stripe billing for money-safe webhook handlers, refund/dispute lifecycles, credit audit trails, and idempotency. PROACTIVELY activate for: (1) any Stripe webhook handler (charge.*, invoice.*, customer.subscription.*, charge.dispute.*), (2) credit/balance mutations needing audit logs, (3) refund delta computation from previous_attributes, (4) dispute state machine (past_due hold/restore), (5) idempotency key strategy, (6) list-API pagination with starting_after, (7) plan resolution from price IDs with safety fallback, (8) Postgres text_pattern_ops indexes, (9) exhaustive enum switches, (10) credit reconciliation crons. Complements the official stripe plugin.
